examples: And we also have what is called an accumulator.
The accumulator is empty in fifty five seconds.
There are no tricks, a trolley has an accumulator and a motor.
His orgone-energy accumulator, or orgone box, as it became known, resembled a wooden telephone booth lined with metal sheeting and steel wool.
"He's a natural cricketer - obviously a talented batter, he plays the short ball well, plays pace well and is an accumulator of runs, " said former Sussex keeper Moores.
